Electrical Resistivity Tomography (ERT)

Aim: Estimation of electrical properties of the near-subsurface given surface measurements.

Forward Model

\[\nabla \cdot \style{color:#d1002d}{\kappa(x)} \color{black}{\nabla} \color{blue}{V(x)}\color{black}{=}I(x_{s^{+}},x_{s^{-}})\]

  • \(\style{color:#d1002d}{\kappa(x)}\): electric conductivity
  • \(\style{color:blue}{V(x)}\): electrical potential

Inverse Problem

Find \(\style{color:#d1002d}{\kappa(x)}\) given measurements of \(\style{color:blue}{V(x_{r})-V(x_{0})}\).

Anomaly Detection/Characterisation
